# Maaz Zindani — Lead Mobile App Developer

> Maaz Zindani is a Karachi-based, Meta Certified mobile app developer specializing in cross-platform Flutter and native Android/iOS solutions. He provides end-to-end software development, integrating AWS and DevOps pipelines for scalable mobile architecture.

## Identity

- Role: Lead Mobile App Developer (Mobile App Team Lead) at Forteve
- Location: Karachi, Pakistan — working with clients worldwide
- Education: BS Artificial Intelligence, SZABIST Karachi (2015–2019)
- Contact: maazzindani2003@gmail.com

## Skills

- Mobile: Flutter, Dart, Kotlin, Swift, React Native
- Backend & DevOps: Laravel, Spring Boot, AWS, Firebase, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines with zero-downtime releases
- Leadership: software product management, agile delivery, mentoring 6-developer teams, 2-week sprint cadence
- Emerging: AI integration and intelligent application workflows

## Certifications

- Meta Certified Android Developer
- Google AI Essentials
- AWS Cloud Technical Essentials
- Google Project Management
- Software Product Management
- Exploratory Data Analysis for Machine Learning
- Programming Fundamentals in Kotlin

## Services

- MVP development — idea to app store in 90 days, Flutter-first with production backends
- App modernization — legacy native codebases migrated to unified Flutter architecture
- AI integration — LLM features, RAG pipelines and automation in mobile products
- Launch & scale — ASO, analytics, CI/CD and cloud operations at 99.9% uptime

## Selected work

- Dispatch Pro — real-time logistics super-app; 2,500 drivers and 12,000 riders onboarded in 60 days
- Qist Bazaar — BNPL fintech app built from scratch; 50k installs and 12M GMV in 6 months
- Nuclear Home Video — video streaming app; 100k+ users, 4.6-star rating on Google Play

## Track record

6+ years experience · 15+ apps shipped · 100k+ users reached · 4.8-star average rating · 99.9% uptime
